age: Age of the participant at time of first session
education: Years of education (or education level) at time of first session
MWQ_score: Average score on the Mind Wandering Questionnare (1-5 items)
MWD_score_SES01: Average score on Mind Wandering - Deliberate (1-4 items) at session 1
MWS_score_SES01: Average score on Mind Wandering - Spontaneous (1-4 items) at session 1
MWD_score_SES02: Average score on Mind Wandering - Deliberate (1-4 items) at session 2
MWS_score_SES02: Average score on Mind Wandering - Spontaneous (1-4 items) at session 2
NonWord_sum: Non-words repeated during Non-Word Repetition Test
NonWord_span: Syllable count of non-words repeated (2 of 4) correctly during Non-Word Repetition Test
